title: Nuke block
description: Added a nuclear bomb with enormous power.
body:
This mod adds **tactical nuclear bombs** that can reshape terrain, an **infinite-fire TNT sword**, and a handy **nuclear detonator** for remote destruction! Whether you want to clear out entire chunks for construction projects, experience the thrill of exploding as you walk, or orchestrate chain reactions from a safe distance, this mod has you covered.

**Core Item Descriptions**

**1. Nuke Block**

- **Power**: Devastating! By default, destruction radius is about **40 blocks**, damage radius about **60 blocks**. **You can customize the power** via the configuration GUI (right-click the placed nuke block).
- **Activation**:
    - **Redstone control**: Apply a redstone signal to detonate (recommended for Survival mode).
    - **Manual ignition**: Hold a flint and steel, then **sneak (Shift) + right-click** to light the fuse.
    - **Remote Detonator**: Bind the bomb to a **Nuclear Detonator** to trigger it wirelessly from afar (see Detonator section below).
- **Configuration GUI** (right-click on the nuke block):
    - ![Nuke Settings GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6e4f523b8373757cf49a53a0ddd9de291430034.png)
    - **Blast Radius**: Adjustable from **1 to 200 blocks** (destruction range). Damage range will scale accordingly.
    - **Break Bedrock**: Toggle whether the explosion can destroy **bedrock**. Use with extreme caution!

**2. TNT Sword**

- **Function**: Right-click to launch **primed TNT** toward your crosshair! No ammunition needed, infinite firing – a great tool for clearing mountains or repelling monster hordes (watch your step).

**3. Nuke remote control**

- **Function**: The ultimate remote control for your nuclear arsenal.
    - **Bind**: Right-click on a Nuclear Bomb Block to link it to the detonator.
    - **Unbind**: Right-click on an already bound bomb to remove the link.
    - **Check List**: **Sneak (Shift) + right-click** to display a list of all currently bound bombs in the chat window.
    - **One-key detonation**: Within 3 seconds after the list is displayed in the chat box, **sneak (Shift) + right-click** again to **detonate all bound nuclear bombs in the list simultaneously**. Use with extreme caution!
    - **Clear All Bindings**: Press **Shift + C** to instantly forget all bound bombs.

**Crafting Recipe Preview**

![Nuclear Bomb Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da9d3b992c2c9e26900060369af1cf9bafcb495b.png)

![TNT Sword Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ada04b1311e38fba7b6e681bf6b42eef8f1ecc31.png)

![Nuke remote control Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91c143fe92a926344d41561fd028be70fe414bed.png)

_(Except for the remote control, the specific arrangement for the other recipes is shapeless – just put the corresponding materials directly into the crafting table.)_

**Notes**

1. **Use with caution in Survival mode**: The nuclear bomb has an enormous blast radius (especially if set to 200!). **Do not use it near your base!** The Detonator's "Detonate All" feature is especially dangerous; double-check your list before pressing the button.
2. **TNT Sword safety**: Right-click launches primed TNT. If you stand too close, you will be blown away.
3. **Bedrock destruction**: If you enable "Break Bedrock", the explosion can delete the bottom of the world – irreversible in Survival. Make backups!

---

这个 Mod 添加了足以改变地形的**战术核弹**、**无限火力 TNT 剑**，以及方便远程操控的**核弹遥控器**！无论是想要一键清空区块搞基建，体验边走边炸的极致快感，还是想在安全距离外导演一场连锁爆炸，这里都能满足你。

**核心物品介绍**

**1. 核弹方块**

- **威力**：毁灭性的打击！默认破坏范围约 **40 格**，伤害波及范围约 **60 格**。**威力可自定义**：右键核弹方块即可打开配置界面。
- **激活方式**：
    - **红石控制**：通入红石信号即可引爆（生存建议使用此方式）。
    - **手动点火**：手持打火石，**潜行 (Shift) + 右键** 点燃引信。
    - **遥控器引爆**：将核弹绑定至**核弹遥控器**，即可实现无线远程引爆（详见下方遥控器说明）。
- **配置界面**（右键核弹方块打开）：
    - ![核弹设置页面](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/471c8bedc76c3f5028ff058806df7eacfc30636f_0.webp)
    - **爆炸范围**：可设置为 **1 至 200 格**（破坏半径，伤害范围随之等比变化）。
    - **是否破坏基岩**：开关选项，决定核爆能否摧毁**基岩**。极度危险，慎用！

**2. TNT 剑**

- **功能**：右键即可向准星方向**发射点燃的 TNT**！无需弹药，无限连发，清理山区或击退怪物群的绝佳玩具（请注意脚下安全）。

**3. 核弹遥控器**

- **功能**：掌控核武库的终极遥控装置。
    - **绑定**：右键点击核弹方块，将其与遥控器关联。
    - **解绑**：对已绑定的核弹再次右键，即可解除关联。
    - **查看列表**：**潜行 (Shift) + 右键** 可在聊天栏中显示当前已绑定的所有核弹列表。
    - **一键引爆**：在聊天框显示列表后的3秒内再次 **潜行 (Shift) + 右键**，即可**同时引爆列表中所有已绑定的核弹**。请极度谨慎使用！
    - **清空绑定**：按下 **Shift + C** 键，立刻清空所有绑定记录。

**合成配方预览**

![核弹配方](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da9d3b992c2c9e26900060369af1cf9bafcb495b.png)

![TNT剑配方](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ada04b1311e38fba7b6e681bf6b42eef8f1ecc31.png)

![遥控器配方](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91c143fe92a926344d41561fd028be70fe414bed.png)

_(除了遥控器，其余具体摆放顺序为无序合成，直接在工作台放入对应材料即可)_

**注意事项**

1. **生存模式慎用**：核弹的爆破范围极大（尤其是调到 200 时），**请不要在你家附近使用**！遥控器的“一键全引爆”功能尤为危险，按下确认前请务必核对列表。
2. **TNT剑安全**：右键发射的是点燃的TNT，如果你站得太近会被炸飞。
3. **基岩破坏**：若开启“破坏基岩”选项，核爆可能炸掉世界底层的基岩——生存模式下不可逆，
